mapper.insert: INSERT INTO T_BLDCON_MST ( USER_UUID ,ACC_TOKEN ,REF_TOKEN ,EXPRE_TIME ,TOKEN_YN ,LINK_STRT_DTM ,LINK_END_DTM ,REG_DTM ,MOD_DTM )VALUES ( #{user_id} -- 입력받은 user_id ,#{accessToken} -- 입력받은 accessToken ,#{refresh_token} -- 입력받은 refresh_token ,#{expires_in} -- 입력받은 expires_in ,'Y' ,NOW() ,NOW() ,NOW() ,NOW() )ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE ACC_TOKEN = VALUES(ACC_TOKEN), REF_TOKEN = VALUES(REF_TOKEN), EXPRE_TIME = VALUES(EXPRE_TIME), MOD_DTM = NOW()

INSERT INTO T_BLDINF_TRAN ( SERIAL, CGM_SEQ, CGM_DTM, INIT_VALUE, UPT_VALUE, TREND_RATE, TREND, ERROR_CODE, USER_UUID ) VALUES
(#{item.serialNumber}, #{item.seqNumber}, CONVERT_TZ( STR_TO_DATE(SUBSTRING_INDEX(#{item.eventAt}, '+', 1), '%Y-%m-%dT%H:%i:%s'), '+00:00', '+09:00' ), #{item.initialValue}, #{item.value}, #{item.trendRate}, #{item.trend}, #{item.errorCode}, #{item.user_uuid})
mapper.select: -- 유저 정보 SELECT ACC_TOKEN ,USER_UUID FROM T_BLDCON_MST WHERE ISENS_ID = #{userId}

WITH COMM AS ( SELECT CGM_DTM ,UPT_VALUE FROM T_BLDINF_TRAN WHERE USER_UUID = #{userId} AND CAST(CGM_DTM AS DATETIME) BETWEEN CAST(#{start} AS DATETIME) AND CAST(#{end} AS DATETIME) ) SELECT CGM_DTM AS DTM ,UPT_VALUE AS UPT ,(SELECT AVG(UPT_VALUE) FROM COMM) AS AVG_UPT FROM COMM ORDER BY CGM_DTM DESC LIMIT 2

-- 공복혈당 평균 SELECT AVG(a.UPT_VALUE) AS avgBlood FROM T_BLDINF_TRAN a WHERE a.USER_UUID = #{userId} AND DATE(a.CGM_DTM) = DATE(DATE_FORMAT(#{date}, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s')) AND TIME(DATE_FORMAT(a.CGM_DTM, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s')) BETWEEN '03:00:00' AND COALESCE( ( SELECT MIN(TIME(b.EAT_DATE)) FROM T_FOODHIS_TRAN b WHERE b.USER_UUID = a.USER_UUID AND DATE(b.EAT_DATE) = DATE(DATE_FORMAT(#{date}, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s')) AND TIME(DATE_FORMAT(b.EAT_DATE, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s')) BETWEEN '03:00:00' AND '06:00:00') , '06:00:00' )
SELECT UPT_VALUE as UPT , CGM_DTM as DTM FROM T_BLDINF_TRAN WHERE USER_UUID = #{userId} AND IFNULL(CAST(UPT_VALUE AS UNSIGNED),0) > 0 AND DATE(CGM_DTM) = #{end} ORDER BY CGM_DTM ASC

SELECT dtm , eatType , REPLACE(GROUP_CONCAT(foodNm), ',' , '\r\n' ) AS foodNm FROM ( SELECT a.FOODHIS_SEQ as foodSeq, RTRIM(b.FOOD_NAME) as foodNm, a.EAT_DATE as dtm, a.MEAL_TYPE as mealType, a.EAT_TYPE as eatType FROM T_FOODHIS_TRAN a JOIN T_FOOD_TRAN b WHERE a.FOODHIS_SEQ = b.FOODHIS_SEQ and a.user_uuid = #{userId} and date(a.eat_date) = #{end} and b.FOOD_NAME <> '음식아님' order BY food_seq ) K GROUP BY dtm , eatType

WITH COMM AS ( SELECT * FROM T_BLDINF_TRAN WHERE USER_UUID = #{userId} AND ifnull(UPT_VALUE,0) > 0 AND CGM_DTM BETWEEN STR_TO_DATE(#{start}, '%Y-%m-%dT%H:%i:%s') AND STR_TO_DATE(#{end}, '%Y-%m-%dT%H:%i:%s') )SELECT COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN UPT_VALUE >= 250 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) ,0) AS HIGHTEST ,COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN UPT_VALUE >= 180 AND UPT_VALUE < 250 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END),0) AS HIGHT ,COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN UPT_VALUE >= 70 AND UPT_VALUE < 180 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END),0) AS NORMAL ,COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN UPT_VALUE >= 54 AND UPT_VALUE < 70 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END),0) AS LOW ,COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN UPT_VALUE < 54 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END),0) AS LOWEST FROM COMM

-- 특정 기간 동안의 GMI 계산 SELECT COALESCE(AVG(UPT_VALUE),0) AS AvgBlood ,COALESCE(ROUND(STDDEV_SAMP(UPT_VALUE), 1),0) AS stdBlood ,COALESCE(ROUND((STDDEV_SAMP(UPT_VALUE) / AVG(UPT_VALUE)) * 100, 1),0) AS CV ,COALESCE(ROUND((0.023 * AVG(UPT_VALUE)) + 3.312, 1),0) AS GMI ,(SELECT COALESCE(AVG(a.UPT_VALUE),0) FROM T_BLDINF_TRAN a WHERE a.USER_UUID = #{userId} AND CGM_DTM BETWEEN STR_TO_DATE(#{start}, '%Y-%m-%dT%H:%i:%s') AND STR_TO_DATE(#{end}, '%Y-%m-%dT%H:%i:%s') AND TIME(DATE_FORMAT(a.CGM_DTM, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s')) BETWEEN '03:00:00' AND COALESCE( ( SELECT MIN(TIME(b.EAT_DATE)) FROM T_FOODHIS_TRAN b WHERE b.USER_UUID = a.USER_UUID AND CGM_DTM BETWEEN STR_TO_DATE(#{start}, '%Y-%m-%dT%H:%i:%s') AND STR_TO_DATE(#{end}, '%Y-%m-%dT%H:%i:%s') AND TIME(DATE_FORMAT(b.EAT_DATE, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s')) BETWEEN '03:00:00' AND '06:00:00') , '06:00:00' ) ) AS FASTING FROM T_BLDINF_TRAN WHERE USER_UUID = #{userId} AND CGM_DTM >= DATE(#{start}) AND CGM_DTM < DATE(#{end})+'23:59:59'

select ROUND(AVG(IFNULL(ROUND ( (IFNULL(breakfast,0) + IFNULL(lunch,0) + IFNULL(dinner,0)) / (3 - (IF(IFNULL(breakfast,0) = 0,1,0) + IF(IFNULL(lunch,0) = 0,1,0) + IF(IFNULL(dinner,0) = 0,1,0) )) ,.1),0)),.1) AS avgBlood from ( select USER_UUID , date , case when IFNULL(CAST(breakfast AS UNSIGNED),0) > 0 then (select UPT_VALUE from T_BLDINF_TRAN where USER_UUID = k.USER_UUID and cgm_dtm = k.breakfast) end breakfast , case when IFNULL(CAST(lunch AS UNSIGNED),0) > 0 then (select UPT_VALUE from T_BLDINF_TRAN where USER_UUID = k.USER_UUID and cgm_dtm = k.lunch) end lunch , case when IFNULL(CAST(dinner AS UNSIGNED),0) > 0 then (select UPT_VALUE from T_BLDINF_TRAN where USER_UUID = k.USER_UUID and cgm_dtm = k.dinner) end dinner from ( SELECT DATE_FORMAT(b.EAT_DATE, '%c/%e') AS date , a.USER_UUID , MIN(CASE when date(b.EAT_DATETIME) = DATE(a.cgm_dtm) AND b.EAT_DATETIME <= date_add(a.cgm_dtm,interval 2 hour) AND b.EAT_TYPE = '0' THEN a.cgm_dtm END) breakfast , MIN(CASE when date(b.EAT_DATETIME) = DATE(a.cgm_dtm) AND b.EAT_DATETIME <= date_add(a.cgm_dtm,interval 2 hour) AND b.EAT_TYPE = '1' THEN a.cgm_dtm END) lunch , MIN(CASE when date(b.EAT_DATETIME) = DATE(a.cgm_dtm) AND b.EAT_DATETIME <= date_add(a.cgm_dtm,interval 2 hour) AND b.EAT_TYPE = '2' THEN a.cgm_dtm END) dinner FROM T_BLDINF_TRAN a , (SELECT USER_UUID , EAT_TYPE , DATE(EAT_DATE) as EAT_DATE , MIN(EAT_DATE) AS EAT_DATETIME FROM T_FOODHIS_TRAN GROUP BY USER_UUID , EAT_TYPE , DATE(EAT_DATE)) b WHERE a.USER_UUID = #{userId} AND b.USER_UUID = a.USER_UUID AND b.EAT_DATE >= DATE(#{start}) AND b.EAT_DATE < DATE(#{end}) Group by DATE_FORMAT(b.EAT_DATE, '%c/%e') ) k ) l

select ROUND(AVG(IFNULL(ROUND ( (ifnull(breakfast,0) + ifnull(lunch,0) + ifnull(dinner,0)) / (3 - (IF(ifnull(breakfast,0) = 0,1,0) + IF(ifnull(lunch,0) = 0,1,0) + IF(ifnull(dinner,0) = 0,1,0) )) ,.1),0)) ,.1) as avgFASTING from ( select USER_UUID , date , case when breakfast is not null then (select UPT_VALUE from T_BLDINF_TRAN where USER_UUID = k.USER_UUID and cgm_dtm = k.breakfast) end breakfast , case when lunch is not null then (select UPT_VALUE from T_BLDINF_TRAN where USER_UUID = k.USER_UUID and cgm_dtm = k.lunch) end lunch , case when dinner is not null then (select UPT_VALUE from T_BLDINF_TRAN where USER_UUID = k.USER_UUID and cgm_dtm = k.dinner) end dinner from ( SELECT DATE_FORMAT(b.EAT_DATE, '%c/%e') AS date , a.USER_UUID , Max(case when date(b.EAT_DATETIME) = DATE(a.cgm_dtm) AND b.EAT_DATETIME >= a.cgm_dtm AND b.EAT_TYPE = '0' THEN a.cgm_dtm END) breakfast , Max(case when date(b.EAT_DATETIME) = DATE(a.cgm_dtm) AND b.EAT_DATETIME >= a.cgm_dtm AND b.EAT_TYPE = '1' THEN a.cgm_dtm END) lunch , Max(case when date(b.EAT_DATETIME) = DATE(a.cgm_dtm) AND b.EAT_DATETIME >= a.cgm_dtm AND b.EAT_TYPE = '2' THEN a.cgm_dtm END) dinner FROM T_BLDINF_TRAN a , (SELECT USER_UUID , EAT_TYPE , DATE(EAT_DATE) as EAT_DATE , MIN(EAT_DATE) AS EAT_DATETIME FROM T_FOODHIS_TRAN GROUP BY USER_UUID , EAT_TYPE , DATE(EAT_DATE)) b WHERE a.USER_UUID = #{userId} AND b.USER_UUID = a.USER_UUID AND b.EAT_DATE >= DATE(#{start}) AND b.EAT_DATE <= DATE(#{end}) Group by DATE_FORMAT(b.EAT_DATE, '%c/%e') ) k ) l
SELECT count(*) FROM T_BLDCON_MST WHERE USER_UUID = #{userUuid}
SELECT REF_TOKEN FROM T_BLDCON_MST WHERE USER_UUID = #{userUuid}

SELECT CGM_DTM, CONCAT( IF(DATE_FORMAT(CGM_DTM, '%p') = 'AM', '오전', '오후'), ' ', DATE_FORMAT(CGM_DTM, '%h:%i')) AS formatedDate ,UPT_VALUE FROM T_BLDINF_TRAN WHERE USER_UUID = #{userUuid} AND DATE(CGM_DTM) = CURDATE() ORDER BY CGM_DTM DESC LIMIT 2

SELECT COALESCE(ROUND(AVG(a.UPT_VALUE), 1),0) AS avgBlood FROM T_BLDINF_TRAN a JOIN T_FOODHIS_TRAN b WHERE a.USER_UUID = #{userId} AND DATE(a.CGM_DTM) = CURDATE() AND DATE(b.EAT_DATE) = CURDATE() AND TIME(a.CGM_DTM) BETWEEN TIME(b.EAT_DATE) AND TIME(DATE_ADD(b.EAT_DATE, INTERVAL 2 HOUR));

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(a.CGM_DTM, '%c/%e') AS date, SUBSTRING(a.CGM_DTM,1,10) AS date2, COALESCE(ROUND(AVG(a.UPT_VALUE), 1), 0) AS avgBlood FROM T_BLDINF_TRAN a WHERE a.USER_UUID = #{userId} AND a.CGM_DTM >= DATE(#{start}) AND a.CGM_DTM < DATE(#{end})+'23:59:59' and ifnull(a.UPT_VALUE,0) > 0 group by date, date2 order by date2

SELECT ROUND(AVG(UPT_VALUE),.1) UPT_VALUE , DATE_FORMAT(CGM_DTM,'%y%m%d') CGM_DTM , SUBSTR(CGM_DTM,11,3) CGM_TM FROM T_BLDINF_TRAN a WHERE a.USER_UUID = #{userId} AND a.CGM_DTM >= DATE(#{start}) AND a.CGM_DTM < DATE(#{end})+'23:59:59' AND ifnull(a.UPT_VALUE,0) > 0 GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(CGM_DTM,'%y%m%d') , SUBSTR(CGM_DTM,11,3) Order by CGM_DTM , CGM_TM asc

SELECT A.CGM_DTM , A.AVG_VALUE , A.MAX_VALUE , A.MIN_VALUE as MIN_VALUE , (SELECT ROUND(AVG(B.UPT_VALUE),.1) AS AVG_VALUE FROM T_BLDINF_TRAN B WHERE B.USER_UUID = A.USER_UUID AND DATE(B.CGM_DTM) >= DATE(#{start}) AND DATE(B.CGM_DTM) <= DATE(#{end})+'23:59:59' AND IFNULL(B.UPT_VALUE,0) > 0 AND A.CGM_DTM = SUBSTR(B.CGM_DTM,12,2) AND A.AVG_VALUE < B.UPT_VALUE ) AVGM_VALUE ,(SELECT ROUND(AVG(C.UPT_VALUE),.1) AS AVG_VALUE FROM T_BLDINF_TRAN C WHERE C.USER_UUID = A.USER_UUID AND DATE(C.CGM_DTM) >= DATE(#{start}) AND DATE(C.CGM_DTM) <= DATE(#{end})+'23:59:59' AND IFNULL(C.UPT_VALUE,0) > 0 AND A.CGM_DTM = SUBSTR(C.CGM_DTM,12,2) AND A.AVG_VALUE > C.UPT_VALUE ) AVGL_VALUE FROM ( SELECT A.USER_UUID , SUBSTR(A.CGM_DTM,12,2) AS CGM_DTM , ROUND(AVG(A.UPT_VALUE),.1) AS AVG_VALUE , MAX(IFNULL(CAST(A.UPT_VALUE AS UNSIGNED),0)) AS MAX_VALUE , MIN(IFNULL(CAST(A.UPT_VALUE AS UNSIGNED),0)) AS MIN_VALUE FROM T_BLDINF_TRAN A WHERE A.USER_UUID = #{userId} AND A.CGM_DTM >= DATE(#{start}) AND A.CGM_DTM < DATE(#{end})+'23:59:59' AND IFNULL(A.UPT_VALUE,0) > 0 GROUP BY SUBSTR(A.CGM_DTM,12,2) , A.USER_UUID ORDER BY SUBSTR(A.CGM_DTM,12,2) ) A

SELECT date , date2 , sum(CASE WHEN GUBUN = '1' THEN avgblood end) avgBlood , sum(CASE WHEN GUBUN = '2' THEN avgblood end) avgpost , sum(CASE WHEN GUBUN = '3' THEN avgblood end) avgfasting FROM ( SELECT '1' AS GUBUN , DATE_FORMAT(a.CGM_DTM, '%c/%e') AS date, SUBSTRING(a.CGM_DTM,1,10) AS date2, COALESCE(ROUND(AVG(a.UPT_VALUE), 1), 0) AS avgBlood FROM T_BLDINF_TRAN a WHERE a.USER_UUID = #{userId} AND a.CGM_DTM >= DATE(#{start}) AND a.CGM_DTM < DATE(#{end})+'23:59:59' and ifnull(a.UPT_VALUE,0) > 0 group by date , date2
UNION ALL select '2' AS GUBUN , date , date2 , IFNULL(ROUND ( (IFNULL(breakfast,0) + IFNULL(lunch,0) + IFNULL(dinner,0)) / (3 - (IF(IFNULL(breakfast,0) = 0,1,0) + IF(IFNULL(lunch,0) = 0,1,0) + IF(IFNULL(dinner,0) = 0,1,0) )) ,.1),0) as avgPostMeal from ( select USER_UUID , date , date2 , case when breakfast is not null then (select UPT_VALUE from T_BLDINF_TRAN where USER_UUID = k.USER_UUID and cgm_dtm = k.breakfast) end breakfast , case when lunch is not null then (select UPT_VALUE from T_BLDINF_TRAN where USER_UUID = k.USER_UUID and cgm_dtm = k.lunch) end lunch , case when dinner is not null then (select UPT_VALUE from T_BLDINF_TRAN where USER_UUID = k.USER_UUID and cgm_dtm = k.dinner) end dinner from ( SELECT DATE_FORMAT(b.EAT_DATE, '%c/%e') AS date , a.USER_UUID , DATE(EAT_DATE) AS date2 , MIN(case when date(b.EAT_DATETIME) = DATE(a.cgm_dtm) AND b.EAT_DATETIME <= date_add(a.cgm_dtm,interval 2 hour) AND b.EAT_TYPE = '0' THEN a.cgm_dtm END) breakfast , MIN(case when date(b.EAT_DATETIME) = DATE(a.cgm_dtm) AND b.EAT_DATETIME <= date_add(a.cgm_dtm,interval 2 hour) AND b.EAT_TYPE = '1' THEN a.cgm_dtm END) lunch , MIN(case when date(b.EAT_DATETIME) = DATE(a.cgm_dtm) AND b.EAT_DATETIME <= date_add(a.cgm_dtm,interval 2 hour) AND b.EAT_TYPE = '2' THEN a.cgm_dtm END) dinner FROM T_BLDINF_TRAN a , (SELECT USER_UUID , EAT_TYPE , DATE(EAT_DATE) as EAT_DATE , MIN(EAT_DATE) AS EAT_DATETIME FROM T_FOODHIS_TRAN GROUP BY USER_UUID , EAT_TYPE , DATE(EAT_DATE)) b WHERE a.USER_UUID = #{userId} AND b.USER_UUID = a.USER_UUID AND b.EAT_DATE >= DATE(#{start}) AND b.EAT_DATE < DATE(#{end})+'23:59:59' Group by DATE_FORMAT(b.EAT_DATE, '%c/%e') , date2 ) k ) l UNION ALL select '3' AS GUBUN , date , date2 , IFNULL(ROUND ( (ifnull(breakfast,0) + ifnull(lunch,0) + ifnull(dinner,0)) / (3 - (IF(ifnull(breakfast,0) = 0,1,0) + IF(ifnull(lunch,0) = 0,1,0) + IF(ifnull(dinner,0) = 0,1,0) )) ,.1),0) as avgFasting from ( select USER_UUID , date , date2 , case when breakfast is not null then (select UPT_VALUE from T_BLDINF_TRAN where USER_UUID = k.USER_UUID and cgm_dtm = k.breakfast) end breakfast , case when lunch is not null then (select UPT_VALUE from T_BLDINF_TRAN where USER_UUID = k.USER_UUID and cgm_dtm = k.lunch) end lunch , case when dinner is not null then (select UPT_VALUE from T_BLDINF_TRAN where USER_UUID = k.USER_UUID and cgm_dtm = k.dinner) end dinner from ( SELECT DATE_FORMAT(b.EAT_DATE, '%c/%e') AS date , a.USER_UUID , DATE(EAT_DATE) AS date2 , Max(case when date(b.EAT_DATETIME) = DATE(a.cgm_dtm) AND b.EAT_DATETIME >= a.cgm_dtm AND b.EAT_TYPE = '0' THEN a.cgm_dtm END) breakfast , Max(case when date(b.EAT_DATETIME) = DATE(a.cgm_dtm) AND b.EAT_DATETIME >= a.cgm_dtm AND b.EAT_TYPE = '1' THEN a.cgm_dtm END) lunch , Max(case when date(b.EAT_DATETIME) = DATE(a.cgm_dtm) AND b.EAT_DATETIME >= a.cgm_dtm AND b.EAT_TYPE = '2' THEN a.cgm_dtm END) dinner FROM T_BLDINF_TRAN a , (SELECT USER_UUID , EAT_TYPE , DATE(EAT_DATE) as EAT_DATE , MIN(EAT_DATE) AS EAT_DATETIME FROM T_FOODHIS_TRAN GROUP BY USER_UUID , EAT_TYPE , DATE(EAT_DATE)) b WHERE a.USER_UUID = #{userId} and b.USER_UUID = a.USER_UUID AND b.EAT_DATE >= DATE(#{start}) AND b.EAT_DATE < DATE(#{end})+'23:59:59' Group by DATE_FORMAT(b.EAT_DATE, '%c/%e') , date2 ) k ) l ) M group by date , date2 order by date2

SELECT USER_UUID , WEEK_GU , CASE WHEN WEEK_GU = '0' THEN '월요일' WHEN WEEK_GU = '1' THEN '화요일' WHEN WEEK_GU = '2' THEN '수요일' WHEN WEEK_GU = '3' THEN '목요일' WHEN WEEK_GU = '4' THEN '금요일' WHEN WEEK_GU = '5' THEN '토요일' WHEN WEEK_GU = '6' THEN '일요일' END weekNm , ROUND(SUM(IFNULL(LOW,0)) / SUM(IFNULL(LOW,0) + IFNULL(NOR,0) + IFNULL(WARN,0) + IFNULL(DANR,0)) * 100,.1) lowAvg , ROUND(SUM(IFNULL(NOR,0)) / SUM(IFNULL(LOW,0) + IFNULL(NOR,0) + IFNULL(WARN,0) + IFNULL(DANR,0)) * 100,.1) norAvg , ROUND(SUM(IFNULL(WARN,0)) / SUM(IFNULL(LOW,0) + IFNULL(NOR,0) + IFNULL(WARN,0) + IFNULL(DANR,0)) * 100,.1) warnAvg , ROUND(SUM(IFNULL(DANR,0)) / SUM(IFNULL(LOW,0) + IFNULL(NOR,0) + IFNULL(WARN,0) + IFNULL(DANR,0)) * 100,.1) dangAvg , SUM(LOW + NOR +WARN + DANR) AS TOTAL_CNT FROM ( SELECT a.USER_UUID ,WEEKDAY(DATE(CGM_DTM)) WEEK_GU , IFNULL(CASE WHEN UPT_VALUE >= 0 AND UPT_VALUE < 70 THEN 1 end,0) LOW , IFNULL(CASE WHEN UPT_VALUE >= 70 AND UPT_VALUE < 140 THEN 1 end,0) NOR , IFNULL(CASE WHEN UPT_VALUE >= 140 AND UPT_VALUE < 200 THEN 1 end,0) WARN , IFNULL(Case when UPT_VALUE >= 200 tHEN 1 end,0) DANR FROM T_BLDINF_TRAN a where a.USER_UUID = #{userId} and DATE(a.cgm_dtm) BETWEEN #{start} AND #{end} and ifnull(a.UPT_VALUE,0) > 0 ) K GROUP BY USER_UUID , WEEK_GU ORDER BY WEEK_GU ASC

select USER_UUID , date ,date2 , IFNULL(breakfast,0) breakfast , IFNULL(lunch,0) lunch , IFNULL(dinner,0) dinner , IFNULL(ROUND ( (IFNULL(breakfast,0) + IFNULL(lunch,0) + IFNULL(dinner,0)) / (3 - (IF(IFNULL(breakfast,0) = 0,1,0) + IF(IFNULL(lunch,0) = 0,1,0) + IF(IFNULL(dinner,0) = 0,1,0) )) ,.1),0) as avgPostMeal , case when ifnull(breakfast,0) + ifnull(lunch,0) + ifnull(dinner,0) > 0 then ceil(greatest(ifnull(breakfast,0), ifnull(lunch,0), ifnull(dinner,0))/100)*100 else 0 end as max from ( select USER_UUID , date , IFNULL(CAST(date2 AS UNSIGNED),0) date2 , case when breakfast is not null then (select UPT_VALUE from T_BLDINF_TRAN where USER_UUID = k.USER_UUID and cgm_dtm = k.breakfast) end breakfast , case when lunch is not null then (select UPT_VALUE from T_BLDINF_TRAN where USER_UUID = k.USER_UUID and cgm_dtm = k.lunch) end lunch , case when dinner is not null then (select UPT_VALUE from T_BLDINF_TRAN where USER_UUID = k.USER_UUID and cgm_dtm = k.dinner) end dinner from ( SELECT DATE_FORMAT(b.EAT_DATE, '%c/%e') AS date , a.USER_UUID , DATE_FORMAT(b.EAT_DATE, '%m%d') AS date2 , MIN(case when date(b.EAT_DATETIME) = DATE(a.cgm_dtm) AND b.EAT_DATETIME <= date_add(a.cgm_dtm,interval 2 hour) AND b.EAT_TYPE = '0' THEN a.cgm_dtm END) breakfast , MIN(case when date(b.EAT_DATETIME) = DATE(a.cgm_dtm) AND b.EAT_DATETIME <= date_add(a.cgm_dtm,interval 2 hour) AND b.EAT_TYPE = '1' THEN a.cgm_dtm END) lunch , MIN(case when date(b.EAT_DATETIME) = DATE(a.cgm_dtm) AND b.EAT_DATETIME <= date_add(a.cgm_dtm,interval 2 hour) AND b.EAT_TYPE = '2' THEN a.cgm_dtm END) dinner FROM T_BLDINF_TRAN a , (SELECT USER_UUID , EAT_TYPE , DATE(EAT_DATE) as EAT_DATE , MIN(EAT_DATE) AS EAT_DATETIME FROM T_FOODHIS_TRAN GROUP BY USER_UUID , EAT_TYPE , DATE(EAT_DATE)) b WHERE a.USER_UUID = #{userId} AND b.USER_UUID = a.USER_UUID AND b.EAT_DATE >= DATE(#{start}) AND b.EAT_DATE < DATE(#{end})+'23:59:59' Group by DATE_FORMAT(b.EAT_DATE, '%c/%e') , DATE_FORMAT(b.EAT_DATE, '%m%d') ) k ) l order by date2 ,date ASC

select USER_UUID , date , ifnull(breakfast,0) breakfast , ifnull(lunch,0) lunch , ifnull(dinner,0) dinner , IFNULL(ROUND ( (ifnull(breakfast,0) + ifnull(lunch,0) + ifnull(dinner,0)) / (3 - (IF(ifnull(breakfast,0) = 0,1,0) + IF(ifnull(lunch,0) = 0,1,0) + IF(ifnull(dinner,0) = 0,1,0) )) ,.1),0) as avgFasting from ( select USER_UUID , date , case when breakfast is not null then (select UPT_VALUE from T_BLDINF_TRAN where USER_UUID = k.USER_UUID and cgm_dtm = k.breakfast) end breakfast , case when lunch is not null then (select UPT_VALUE from T_BLDINF_TRAN where USER_UUID = k.USER_UUID and cgm_dtm = k.lunch) end lunch , case when dinner is not null then (select UPT_VALUE from T_BLDINF_TRAN where USER_UUID = k.USER_UUID and cgm_dtm = k.dinner) end dinner from ( SELECT DATE_FORMAT(b.EAT_DATE, '%c/%e') AS date , a.USER_UUID , Max(case when date(b.EAT_DATETIME) = DATE(a.cgm_dtm) AND b.EAT_DATETIME >= a.cgm_dtm AND b.EAT_TYPE = '0' THEN a.cgm_dtm END) breakfast , Max(case when date(b.EAT_DATETIME) = DATE(a.cgm_dtm) AND b.EAT_DATETIME >= a.cgm_dtm AND b.EAT_TYPE = '1' THEN a.cgm_dtm END) lunch , Max(case when date(b.EAT_DATETIME) = DATE(a.cgm_dtm) AND b.EAT_DATETIME >= a.cgm_dtm AND b.EAT_TYPE = '2' THEN a.cgm_dtm END) dinner FROM T_BLDINF_TRAN a , (SELECT USER_UUID , EAT_TYPE , DATE(EAT_DATE) as EAT_DATE , MIN(EAT_DATE) AS EAT_DATETIME FROM T_FOODHIS_TRAN GROUP BY USER_UUID , EAT_TYPE , DATE(EAT_DATE)) b WHERE a.USER_UUID = #{userId} and b.USER_UUID = a.USER_UUID AND b.EAT_DATE >= DATE(#{start}) AND b.EAT_DATE < DATE(#{end})+'23:59:59' Group by DATE_FORMAT(b.EAT_DATE, '%c/%e') ) k ) l order by date

select USER_UUID , sum(holiday) as holiday , sum(holiday_cnt) as holiday_cnt , round(sum(holiday) / sum(holiday_cnt),.1) as holiday_avg , sum(weekday) as weekday , sum(weekday_cnt) as weekday_cnt , round(sum(weekday) / sum(weekday_cnt),.1) as weekday_avg from ( SELECT a.USER_UUID , CASE when WEEKDAY(DATE(a.cgm_dtm) ) in ('5','6') then a.UPT_VALUE end holiday , CASE when WEEKDAY(DATE(a.cgm_dtm) ) in ('5','6') then 1 end holiday_cnt , Case when WEEKDAY(DATE(a.cgm_dtm) ) in ('0','1','2','3','4') then a.UPT_VALUE end weekday , CASE when WEEKDAY(DATE(a.cgm_dtm) ) in ('0','1','2','3','4') then 1 end weekday_cnt FROM T_BLDINF_TRAN a where a.USER_UUID = #{userId} AND a.CGM_DTM >= DATE(#{start}) AND a.CGM_DTM < DATE(#{end})+'23:59:59' and ifnull(a.UPT_VALUE,0) > 0 ) k group by USER_UUID
